hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r .tool_input.command < /dev/stdin); case "$CMD" in *"git commit"*|*"git "*" commit"*) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; API_FILES=$(git diff --cached --name-only -- python/pz_drive_py.py python/music.py python/drv2665.py python/shift_register.py python/web_server.py); [ -z "$API_FILES" ] && exit 0; DOCS_STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only -- web/docs.html web/api.html); if [ -z "$DOCS_STAGED" ]; then echo "WARNING: API source files changed but docs pages are not staged."; echo "Changed API files: $API_FILES"; echo "Consider updating web/docs.html and/or web/api.html to reflect the API changes."; fi; exit 0'
bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path" < /dev/stdin); case "$FILE" in *.py) ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>&1 ;; *.c|*.h) clang-format -i "$FILE" 2>&1 ;; esac; exit 0'
